'''ân-s-p-t''' ('''kanaspetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antevolate|antevolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antevolate|antevolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-s-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanaspetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinaspetoko|thinaspetoko]] || [[word:jinaspetoko|jinaspetoko]] || [[word:shinaspetoko|shinaspetoko]] || [[word:kinaspetoko|kinaspetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonaspetoko|thonaspetoko]] || [[word:jonaspetoko|jonaspetoko]] || [[word:shonaspetoko|shonaspetoko]] || [[word:konaspetoko|konaspetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnaspetoko|thĂŠnaspetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnaspetoko|jĂŠnaspetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnaspetoko|shĂŠnaspetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnaspetoko|kĂŠnaspetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
